name: ConnectToPythonPartState
summary: Enumeration of the possible types of relationships in a PythonPart connection.

enum_values.name: IS_CHILD
enum_values.summary: Connected PythonPart is the child of the other PythonPart.

enum_values.name: IS_PARENT
enum_values.summary: Connected PythonPart is the parent of the other PythonPart.

enum_values.name: IS_PARENT_CHILD
enum_values.summary: Creates a connection in both directions.
